description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Static analysis checks that runs on every pull request, push, and once a day. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to run various static analysis tools including bandit, doc8, flake8, pylint, black-check, and isort-check. For each tool, check out the repository, set up Python 3.8, upgrade pip, install dependencies from dev_requirements/ci-requirements.txt, and run tox with the corresponding test environment.
